narrative:
James A Garfield Local Sd (Portage) school district has 5,736 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.2 percentage points.
